name: griot
description: An AI Slack teammate with institutional memory
author: Deevyn Ifunanya

scripts.job:summary: npm run build -w @griot/agent && node --env-file=.env packages/agent/dist/run-job.js daily_summary
scripts.job:deadline: npm run build -w @griot/agent && node --env-file=.env packages/agent/dist/run-job.js deadline_check
